inputs.text: Product photography of a heavy handmade Gaboratory bicolor silver gold ring, vintage oxidized sterling silver base with 18k brass gold inlaid carved details, extra-wide flat band with a raised shield-shaped bezel at the front, the bezel background textured with fine overlapping scales (dragon-scale pattern in concentric rows), foreground on the shield features a gothic cross pattée, three roses arranged vertically – one at the cross center, two at the base of the cross, gold-inlaid roses, cross edges, and scale highlights, oxidized silver cross arms, rose leaves, and scale field with engraved gothic filigree, gold-inlaid tiny thorn vines along the shield border, the rest of the band continues the scale texture with gold-inlaid crosses every quarter, inner band signed "Gaboratory" with date hallmark, soft diffused natural light, laid flat on creamy white fine suede fabric background, subtle matte texture, shallow depth of field, 8K ultra-detailed, macro metal texture shot, luxury men's gothic biker jewelry, neutral soft tone, commercial jewelry shot, sharp focus on metal engravings, no shadows overload
